name: Venison Au Vin (Venison Au Vin)
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cream of mushroom soup (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the red wine vinegar, water, salt, and 1/2 teaspoon of Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
2. Pour this mixture over the venison, cover securely, and refrigerate overnight or for at least 8 hours.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add garlic and onions to the skillet and sauté until the onions are clear.
5. Meanwhile, rub the salt, cayenne flakes (if using), and Worcestershire sauce onto the venison.
6. Place the venison into the skillet and add the 2 cans of cream of mushroom soup.
7. Cover the pan and transfer it to a preheated oven set at 325°F.
8. Cook for 30 minutes, then add the wine and bay leaves.
9. Continue cooking for an additional 2 hours, basting the meat every 20-30 minutes.
10. When there are 10 minutes of cooking time remaining, remove the cover and allow the venison to brown before serving.
